title: Borukva Food Exotic
description: This mod is an addon for the Borukva Food mod and adds several new types of trees, fruits, vegetables and berries.
body:
# Borukva Food Exotic
This mod is an addon for the [Borukva Food](https://modrinth.com/mod/borukva-food) mod and adds several new types of trees, fruits, vegetables and berries.

[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-join?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&labelColor=5865F2&color=5865F2&link=https%3A%2F%2)](https://discord.gg/4nZYz3a4KE)
[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Github-label?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white&labelColor=000000&color=000000&link=https%3A%2F%2)](https://github.com/SunPhoen1x/Borukva-Food-Exotic)

![Borukva Food Exotic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3b9f7049f14641b42e8d15c669dcd71494829cc.png)

# New features
I also added new types of **vegetables and berries**: eggplant, yellow pepper, green bean, broccoli, peas, spinach, garlic and strawberries.

<details>
<summary>New Vegetables</summary>

![New Vegetables](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4305c4a16529d00289c411b8046380107fad16ee.png)



</details>


<details>
<summary>Strawberry</summary>

![Strawberry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2c1fec83843d10ce6c9db80b7e17b92759b5809.png)



</details>




The addon also adds **crates** for storing fruits, vegetables and fish.


<details>
<summary>Fruit Crates</summary>

  
![Fruit Crates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ed31375a8ef085ba07373ce6ba1fd4cf5af9ef1.png)
</details>



<details>
<summary>Vegetable Crates</summary>

  
![Vegetable crates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cbdc48c8038744e64d9c5f942d8d20503ba8d89.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Fish Crates</summary>

  
![Crates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9a0755d7be8dfcf4eef90b5e00ae105295a46c5.png)
</details>




Cooking methods, as well as types of products will be added in subsequent updates
# Recipes
Where can you find all recipes?
<details>
<summary>Polydex</summary>

You can install [Polydex](https://modrinth.com/mod/polydex) and find all recipes.

</details>

# Loot Tables
Where can you find items from this addon in your world?


<details>
<summary>Ruined Portal</summary>

In the ruined portal you can find an eggplant,green bean, broccoli, peas, spinach, garlic seed, a plum and a plum sapling.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Village</summary>

In the Village you can find a kiwi, apricot, pear and a kiwi, apricot and pear sapling, pepper, eggplant, strawberry, green bean, broccoli, peas, spinach, garlic.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Ancient City</summary>

In the Ancient City you can find apricot, pear, orange and plum sapling, pepper, eggplant, strawberry, green bean, broccoli, peas, spinach, garlic.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Fishing</summary>

While fishing you can catch: eggplant seeds, aricot, pear, orange, kiwi and plum sapling, apricot, pear and plum jam, pepper, eggplant, strawberry, green bean, broccoli, peas, spinach, garlic.

</details>

# World Generation
Trees are generated in the **world** and here's where you can find them:

![worldgen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/536451449e7fbae724fc1c5843b583811d846b87.png)
<details>
<summary>Apricot Tree</summary>

You can find the apricot tree in the following biomes: WINDSWEPT FOREST and SAVANNA

</details>

<details>
<summary>Pear Tree</summary>

You can find the pear tree in the following biomes: DARK FOREST and TAIGA

</details>

<details>
<summary>Plum Tree</summary>

You can find the plum tree in the following biomes: PLAINS, SUNFLOWER PLAINS

</details>

<details>
<summary>Kiwi Tree</summary>

You can find the kiwi tree in the following biomes: SPARSE JUNGLE and JUNGLE

</details>
